instruction:
Repair the disturbed scenic SVG: venetian canal sunset.

Patch:
- remove sv_038-extra-survey-marker
- download-sv_038-rect-036.fill: "#ef4444" -> "#6a1a1a"
- download-sv_038-circle-001.cx: 875.0 -> 800
- download-sv_038-path-008.stroke-width: 10.0 -> 4
- download-sv_038-rect-014.opacity: 0.36 -> 0.8
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1600 1000">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="sky18" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#f0a85a" />
      <stop offset="0.4" stop-color="#f6c478" />
      <stop offset="0.75" stop-color="#f8dca0" />
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#fbeccb" />
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="sun18" cx="0.5" cy="0.5" r="0.5">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#fffae8" /><stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#ffe0a0" stop-opacity="0.7" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#ffe0a0" stop-opacity="0" />
    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id="waterTop18" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#e8b878" /><stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#c89060" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#7a6a6a" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="bldgL18" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#d4986a" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#a86a4a" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="bldgR18" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#c88a8a" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#9a5a5a" />
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="refl18" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" /></filter>
  </defs>

  <rect width="1600" height="1000" fill="url(#sky18)" id="download-sv_038-rect-001" />
  <circle cx="875" cy="380" r="320" fill="url(#sun18)" id="download-sv_038-circle-001" />
  <circle cx="800" cy="380" r="74" fill="#fff8e6" id="download-sv_038-circle-002" />

  
  <g fill="#ffe2c0" opacity="0.6"><ellipse cx="300" cy="160" rx="200" ry="34" id="download-sv_038-ellipse-001" /><ellipse cx="1280" cy="220" rx="220" ry="38" id="download-sv_038-ellipse-002" /></g>
